name: Cherry Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the dry ingredients.
2. Beat the egg and add the melted butter, then mix in the mild.
3. Gradually combine the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients until just mixed.
4. Gently fold in the cherries.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter into 1-1/2 to 2 inches of hot fat (like oil or lard) and fry about 2 minutes, turning once halfway through, until golden brown.
6. Remove from the fat with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
7. Dust with confectioners sugar.
These are so easy to make and so good! Fresh peaches, apricots, apples, or pineapple may be used instead of cherries. Also, blueberries are great!
